mapper.select: /* 채팅 에이전트 목록 조회 ai.chatbot.selectAgentListForChat */ SELECT A.AGENT_ID AS AGENT_ID , A.AGENT_NM AS AGENT_NM , A.SVC_TY AS SVC_TY , A.CNCPT_TY AS CNCPT_TY , B.CODE_NM AS SVC_TY_NM , A.DESCRIPTION AS DESCRIPTION , C.ETC1 AS API_PORT , C.ETC2 AS API_ENDPOINT , A.API_URL_CD AS API_URL_CD , A.SORT_ORD AS SORT_ORD , A.USE_YN AS USE_YN , A.ICON_ID AS ICON_ID , A.COLOR_ID AS COLOR_ID , D.ICON_CLASS_NM AS ICON_CLASS_NM , E.COLOR_HEX AS COLOR_HEX FROM TB_AGT A LEFT JOIN TB_CODE B ON A.SVC_TY = B.CODE_ID AND B.CODE_GRP_ID = 'AT000001' LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CODE C ON C.CODE_GRP_ID = 'AA000001' AND C.USE_YN = 'Y' AND C.CODE_ID = A.API_URL_CD LEFT JOIN TB_ICON D ON A.ICON_ID = D.ICON_ID LEFT JOIN TB_COLOR E ON A.COLOR_ID = E.COLOR_ID WHERE 1=1 AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.SORT_ORD, A.AGENT_ID

/* Agent 서브 설정 일괄 조회 ai.chatbot.selectAgentSubCfgListByAgentIds */ SELECT S.SUB_CFG_ID , S.AGENT_ID , S.SUB_TY , S.ADDITIONAL_CONFIG , S.USE_YN , S.CREATE_DT , S.MODIFY_DT FROM TB_AGT_SUB_CFG S WHERE 1=1 AND S.AGENT_ID IN
#{agentId}

/* CHAT 대화방 목록 조회 ai.chatbot.selectChatRoomList */ SELECT A.ROOM_ID AS ROOM_ID , A.ROOM_TITLE AS TITLE , A.CREATE_USER_ID AS USER_ID , A.CREATE_DT AS CREATE_DT , A.LAST_CHAT_DT AS LAST_CHAT_DT , A.FIX_YN AS FIX_YN , FIRST_LOG.AGENT_ID AS AGENT_ID FROM TB_CHAT_ROOM A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT L.ROOM_ID , L.AGENT_ID FROM TB_CHAT_LOG L INNER JOIN ( SELECT ROOM_ID, MIN(LOG_ID) AS MIN_LOG_ID FROM TB_CHAT_LOG GROUP BY ROOM_ID ) FIRST ON L.ROOM_ID = FIRST.ROOM_ID AND L.LOG_ID = FIRST.MIN_LOG_ID ) FIRST_LOG ON A.ROOM_ID = FIRST_LOG.ROOM_ID WHERE 1=1 AND A.CREATE_USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY A.FIX_YN = 'Y' DESC, A.LAST_CHAT_DT DESC

/* Agent 필터 목록 조회 ai.chatbot.selectAgtFilterList */ SELECT A.AGENT_ID AS AGENT_ID , A.AGENT_NM AS AGENT_NM , A.SVC_TY AS SVC_TY , A.SORT_ORD AS SORT_ORD FROM TB_AGT A WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY A.SORT_ORD, A.AGENT_ID

/* 모델 목록 조회 ai.chatbot.selectModelList */ SELECT A.MODEL_ID AS VALUE , A.MODEL_NAME AS LABEL , A.PROVIDER_ID , A.VERSION , A.INPUT_COST , A.OUTPUT_COST , A.USE_YN , A.DESCRIPTION , A.SORT_ORDER , A.CREATE_DT , A.MODIFY_DT FROM TB_LLM_MDL A WHERE 1=1 AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.SORT_ORDER

/* RAG 데이터 목록 조회 ai.chatbot.selectRagDsList */ SELECT B.DATASET_ID AS VALUE , C.DS_NM AS LABEL FROM TB_AGT A LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_AGT_DS B ON B.AGENT_ID = A.AGENT_ID INNER JOIN TB_DS C ON C.DATASET_ID = B.DATASET_ID WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND C.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.SVC_TY IN ('M', 'D') AND A.AGENT_ID = #{agentId} GROUP BY B.DATASET_ID, C.DS_NM

/* 데이터마트 조회 ai.chatbot.selectDmList */ SELECT B.DATAMART_ID AS VALUE , C.DM_NM AS LABEL FROM TB_AGT A LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_AGT_DM B ON B.AGENT_ID = A.AGENT_ID INNER JOIN TB_DM C ON C.DATAMART_ID = B.DATAMART_ID WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND C.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.SVC_TY = 'S' AND A.AGENT_ID = #{agentId} GROUP BY B.DATAMART_ID, C.DM_NM

/* 에이전트 API URL 조회 ai.chatbot.selectApiUrlEndpoint */ SELECT A.AGENT_ID , A.AGENT_NM , A.API_URL_CD , B.ETC1 AS API_PORT , B.ETC2 AS API_ENDPOINT FROM TB_AGT A LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CODE B ON B.CODE_GRP_ID = 'AA000001' AND B.USE_YN = 'Y' AND B.CODE_ID = A.API_URL_CD WHERE 1=1 AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.AGENT_ID = #{agentId}
mapper.insert: /* CHAT 대화방 등록 ai.chatbot.insertChatRoom */ INSERT INTO TB_CHAT_ROOM (ROOM_TITLE, CREATE_USER_ID, CREATE_DT, LAST_CHAT_DT) VALUES (#{roomTitle}, #{userId}, NOW(), NOW())

/* 공유 토큰 등록 ai.chatbot.insertShareToken — EXPIRED_DT: NOW() + 3일 */ INSERT INTO TB_SHARE_TOKEN (SHARE_TOKEN, ROOM_ID, CRTR_ID, CREATE_DT, EXPIRED_DT, FILE_SHARE_YN) VALUES ( #{shareToken}, #{roomId}, #{userId}, NOW(), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 DAY), IFNULL(#{includeAttachment}, 'N') )
mapper.select: /* 대화방 첨부파일 존재 여부 (ROOM→LOG→FILE 3-way JOIN) ai.chatbot.selectHasAttachmentByRoomId */ SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(F.CHAT_FILE_ID) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END FROM TB_CHAT_ROOM R INNER JOIN TB_CHAT_LOG L ON L.ROOM_ID = R.ROOM_ID INNER JOIN TB_CHAT_FILE F ON F.LOG_ID = L.LOG_ID AND IFNULL(F.FILE_EXIST_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' WHERE R.ROOM_ID = #{roomId}

/* 유효한 공유 토큰 → ROOM_ID, FILE_SHARE_YN (만료되지 않은 경우만) ai.chatbot.selectShareTokenValidRoomId */ SELECT T.ROOM_ID AS roomId , T.FILE_SHARE_YN AS includeAttachment FROM TB_SHARE_TOKEN T WHERE T.SHARE_TOKEN = #{shareToken} AND T.EXPIRED_DT > NOW()

/* 공유 복사용 원본 채팅 로그 (시간순, insertChatLog 매핑용) ai.chatbot.selectChatLogsForShareCopy */ SELECT A.LOG_ID , A.AGENT_ID , A.SVC_TY , A.REF_ID , A.MODEL_ID , A.Q_CONTENT , A.R_CONTENT , IFNULL(A.IN_TOKENS, 0) AS IN_TOKENS , IFNULL(A.OUT_TOKENS, 0) AS OUT_TOKENS , A.SATIS_YN , A.TTSQ , A.TTSQ_PARAM , A.TTSQ_PERIOD_PARAM , A.TABLE_DATA , A.CHART_OPTION , A.WEB_GROUNDING_JSON , A.REPORT_HTML , A.MAIN_DOC_FILE_ID , A.MAIN_PAGE , A.RETRIEVER_QUERY , A.CHUNK , IFNULL(A.REASK_CNT, 0) AS REASK_CNT FROM TB_CHAT_LOG A WHERE A.ROOM_ID = #{roomId} ORDER BY A.CREATE_DT ASC, A.LOG_ID ASC

/* 공유 복사용 TB_CHAT_REF (원본 ROOM) ai.chatbot.selectChatRefsForShareCopyRoom */ SELECT R.LOG_ID AS LOG_ID , R.DOC_FILE_ID , R.MAIN_PAGE_NO , R.RELATED_PAGES FROM TB_CHAT_REF R INNER JOIN TB_CHAT_LOG L ON R.LOG_ID = L.LOG_ID WHERE L.ROOM_ID = #{roomId}

/* 공유 복사용 TB_CHAT_FILE (원본 ROOM, LOG 연결된 행만) ai.chatbot.selectChatFilesForShareCopyRoom */ SELECT F.LOG_ID AS logId , F.FILE_NAME AS fileName , F.STORE_FILE_NAME AS storeFileName , F.FILE_PATH AS filePath , F.FILE_SIZE AS fileSize , F.FILE_TYPE AS fileType , F.CREATE_USER_ID AS chatFileUploaderUserId FROM TB_CHAT_FILE F WHERE F.ROOM_ID = #{roomId} AND F.LOG_ID IS NOT NULL AND IFNULL(F.FILE_EXIST_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' ORDER BY F.LOG_ID ASC, F.CHAT_FILE_ID ASC
mapper.insert: /* CHAT 대화방 로그 등록 ai.chatbot.insertChatLog */ INSERT INTO TB_CHAT_LOG ( ROOM_ID, AGENT_ID, SVC_TY, REF_ID, MODEL_ID, Q_CONTENT, R_CONTENT, IN_TOKENS, OUT_TOKENS, SATIS_YN, TTSQ, TTSQ_PARAM, TTSQ_PERIOD_PARAM, TABLE_DATA, CHART_OPTION, WEB_GROUNDING_JSON, REPORT_HTML, MAIN_DOC_FILE_ID, MAIN_PAGE, RETRIEVER_QUERY, CHUNK, REASK_CNT, CREATE_USER_ID, CREATE_DT ) VALUES ( #{roomId}, #{agentId}, #{svcTy}, #{refId}, #{modelId}, #{qContent}, #{rContent}, #{inTokens}, #{outTokens}, #{satisYn}, #{sql}, #{ttsqParam}, #{ttsqPeriodParam}, #{tableData}, #{chartOption}, #{webGroundingJson}, #{reportHtml}, #{mainDocFileId}, #{mainPage}, #{retrieverQuery}, #{chunk}, #{reaskCnt}, #{userId}, NOW() )

/* CHAT 대화방 참조 등록 ai.chatbot.insertChatRef */ INSERT INTO TB_CHAT_REF ( LOG_ID, DOC_FILE_ID, MAIN_PAGE_NO, RELATED_PAGES, CREATE_DT ) VALUES ( #{logId}, #{docFileId}, #{mainPageNo}, #{relatedPages}, NOW() )
mapper.select: /* CHAT 대화방 로그 목록 조회 ai.chatbot.selectChatLogList */ SELECT A.LOG_ID , A.ROOM_ID , A.SVC_TY , A.AGENT_ID , A.REF_ID , A.Q_CONTENT , A.R_CONTENT , A.IN_TOKENS , A.OUT_TOKENS , A.SATIS_YN , A.SATIS_CONTENT , A.SATIS_DT , A.SATIS_CD , A.TABLE_DATA , A.CHART_OPTION , A.WEB_GROUNDING_JSON , A.REPORT_HTML , A.TTSQ , A.REASK_CNT , A.CREATE_USER_ID , A.CREATE_DT , A.MAIN_DOC_FILE_ID AS DOC_FILE_ID , CASE WHEN A.SVC_TY = 'M' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_CHAT_REF R2 WHERE R2.LOG_ID = A.LOG_ID) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS DOC_EXIST , CASE WHEN A.TTSQ IS NOT NULL AND A.TABLE_DATA IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS TABLE_EXIST , IFNULL(( SELECT JSON_ARRAYAGG(agg.jobj) FROM ( SELECT JSON_OBJECT( 'chatFileId', CAST(F.CHAT_FILE_ID AS CHAR), 'fileName', IFNULL(F.FILE_NAME, ''), 'filePath', IFNULL(F.FILE_PATH, ''), 'mimeType', '', 'createUserId', IFNULL(F.CREATE_USER_ID, '') ) AS jobj FROM TB_CHAT_FILE F WHERE F.LOG_ID = A.LOG_ID AND IFNULL(F.FILE_EXIST_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' ORDER BY F.CHAT_FILE_ID ) AS agg ), JSON_ARRAY()) AS chatAttachmentList FROM TB_CHAT_LOG A WHERE 1=1 AND A.ROOM_ID = #{roomId} ORDER BY A.CREATE_DT DESC

/* CHAT 대화방 참조 문서 목록 조회 ai.chatbot.selectChatDocList */ SELECT A.DOC_FILE_ID , A.DOC_FILE_ID , A.FILE_NAME , A.FILE_PATH , B.MAIN_PAGE_NO , B.RELATED_PAGES , ( SELECT B.MAIN_DOC_FILE_ID FROM TB_CHAT_LOG B WHERE 1 = 1 AND B.LOG_ID = #{logId} ) AS SHOW_DOC_FILE_ID , ( SELECT B.MAIN_PAGE FROM TB_CHAT_LOG B WHERE 1 = 1 AND B.LOG_ID = #{logId} ) AS SHOW_PAGE_NO , ( SELECT B.RETRIEVER_QUERY FROM TB_CHAT_LOG B WHERE 1 = 1 AND B.LOG_ID = #{logId} ) AS RETRIEVER_QUERY FROM TB_DOC_FILE A INNER JOIN TB_CHAT_REF B ON B.DOC_FILE_ID = A.DOC_FILE_ID AND B.LOG_ID = #{logId} WHERE 1=1 AND A.USE_YN = 'Y'

/* CHAT 대화방 tableData 조회 ai.chatbot.selectTableDataList */ SELECT A.LOG_ID , A.ROOM_ID , A.SVC_TY , A.REF_ID , A.Q_CONTENT , A.R_CONTENT , A.IN_TOKENS , A.OUT_TOKENS , A.SATIS_YN , A.TTSQ , A.REASK_CNT , A.CREATE_USER_ID , A.CREATE_DT , A.TABLE_DATA FROM TB_CHAT_LOG A WHERE 1=1 AND A.LOG_ID = #{logId}
mapper.delete: /* 채팅 참조 삭제 ai.chatbot.deleteChatRef */ DELETE FROM TB_CHAT_REF WHERE 1=1 AND LOG_ID IN (SELECT LOG_ID FROM TB_CHAT_LOG WHERE 1=1 AND ROOM_ID = #{roomId})
mapper.select: /* 채팅 로그 단건 조회 ai.chatbot.selectChatLogByLogId */ SELECT A.LOG_ID , A.ROOM_ID , B.ROOM_TITLE , A.SVC_TY , A.REF_ID , A.Q_CONTENT , A.R_CONTENT , A.TTSQ , A.TABLE_DATA , A.WEB_GROUNDING_JSON , A.CREATE_USER_ID AS USER_ID , A.CREATE_DT FROM TB_CHAT_LOG A LEFT JOIN TB_CHAT_ROOM B ON A.ROOM_ID = B.ROOM_ID WHERE 1=1 AND A.LOG_ID = #{logId}
mapper.insert: /* 지식 카드 등록 ai.chatbot.insertKnowledgeCard */ INSERT INTO TB_KNOW_CARD ( CARD_ID, USER_ID, CATEGORY_ID, LOG_ID, SVC_TY, TITLE, TAGS, THUMB_IMG, PIN_YN, ARCHIVE_YN, ARCHIVE_DT, SORT_ORD, SQL_CODE, USE_YN, CREATE_DT, MODIFY_DT ) VALUES ( #{cardId}, #{userId}, #{categoryId}, #{logId}, #{svcTy}, #{title}, #{tags, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{thumbImg, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{pinYn}, #{archiveYn}, #{archiveDt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{sortOrd, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sqlCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{useYn}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: /* 지식 카테고리 목록 조회 ai.chatbot.selectKnowledgeList */ SELECT A.CATEGORY_ID , A.USER_ID , A.CATEGORY_NM , A.COLOR , A.SORT_ORD , A.CREATE_DT FROM TB_KNOW_CAT A WHERE 1=1 AND A.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY A.SORT_ORD
mapper.insert: /* 채팅 파일 저장 ai.chatbot.insertChatFile */ INSERT INTO TB_CHAT_FILE ( ROOM_ID, LOG_ID, FILE_NAME, STORE_FILE_NAME, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE, FILE_TYPE, FILE_EXIST_YN, CREATE_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{roomId}, #{logId}, #{fileName}, #{storeFileName}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{fileType}, 'Y', #{userId} )

/* 공유 로그 복사용 첨부 INSERT (실파일 재사용, CREATE_USER_ID는 원본 업로더 유지) ai.chatbot.insertChatFileShareCopy */ INSERT INTO TB_CHAT_FILE ( ROOM_ID, LOG_ID, FILE_NAME, STORE_FILE_NAME, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE, FILE_TYPE, FILE_EXIST_YN, CREATE_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{roomId}, #{logId}, #{fileName}, #{storeFileName}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{fileType}, 'Y', #{chatFileUploaderUserId} )
mapper.select: /* 채팅 첨부 단건 조회 (사용자 검증 없음 — 공유 페이지 전용) ai.chatbot.selectChatFileById */ SELECT F.CHAT_FILE_ID AS chatFileId, F.FILE_PATH AS filePath, F.FILE_NAME AS fileName, F.FILE_TYPE AS fileType FROM TB_CHAT_FILE F WHERE F.CHAT_FILE_ID = #{chatFileId}
/* 사용자 뉴스 관심 카테고리 조회 ai.chatbot.selectUserNewsInterestCategory */ SELECT NEWSCG_ID , USER_ID , NEWS_CATEGORY_CD , CREATE_DT , MODIFY_DT FROM TB_USER_INTEREST_NEWS_CATEGORY WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}

/* 데이터셋 문서 파일명 목록 조회 ai.chatbot.selectDatasetDocFileNames */ SELECT F.DOC_FILE_ID , F.FILE_NAME FROM TB_DS_DOC D INNER JOIN TB_DOC_FILE F ON F.DOC_FILE_ID = D.DOC_FILE_ID WHERE D.DATASET_ID = #{refId} AND F.USE_YN = 'Y'

/* 챗봇 첨부파일 삭제 대상 조회 ai.chatbot.selectChatFileDelete */ SELECT CHAT_FILE_ID AS chatFileId , LOG_ID AS logId , FILE_NAME AS fileName , STORE_FILE_NAME AS storeFileName , FILE_PATH AS filePath , FILE_SIZE AS fileSize , FILE_TYPE AS fileType , FILE_EXIST_YN AS fileExistYn , CREATE_USER_ID AS createUserId , CREATE_DT AS createDt FROM tb_chat_file WHERE ( CREATE_DT < DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{deleteFileTerm} DAY) AND IFNULL(FILE_EXIST_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' AND (LOG_ID IS NULL OR LOG_ID NOT IN (SELECT LOG_ID FROM TB_KNOW_CARD WHERE LOG_ID IS NOT NULL)) ) OR ( LOG_ID IS NULL AND IFNULL(FILE_EXIST_YN, 'Y') = 'N' )
